29 #include <map>
30 
31 class IXMPropertyInfo;
32 
33 using namespace Arcane;
34 
35 
36 
37 class IXMMeshWriter
38 : public Arcane::IDataWriter
39 , public ArcGeoSim::IXMDataReceiver
40 {
41  public:
42 
45 #if (ARCANE_VERSION >= 30003)
46  IXMMeshWriter(IMesh* mesh, IGraph2* graph,
47 #else
48  IXMMeshWriter(IMesh* mesh,
49 #endif
50  IXmlDocumentHolder* ixm_doc, const String& directory_name,const eIXMMeshWriteInfo & write_mesh, const bool write_faces_infos, const Integer event_number, bool event_initialized, bool
51  write_only_active_cells);
53  virtual ~IXMMeshWriter();
55  void beginMeshWrite(const String& file_name, const String& format, ItemGroupCollection& groups, VariableCollection& vars);
57  void writeMeshToFile(const String& format);
59  void writeCurrentMesh(const String& format, bool first_event);
61  void writeEventToFile(const String& file_name,const Real& begin_time, const Real& end_time, const Integer& event_number);
63  void writeVoidEventToFile(const String& file_name,const Real& begin_time, const Real& end_time, const Integer& event_number);
65  void endMeshWrite();
67  void writeMeshIncrement(const String& format);
69  void writeVoidMesh(const String& format);
70 
71  void updateIxmDoc(const Integer& event_number);
72 
75  void beginWrite(const VariableCollection& vars);
77  void endWrite(){}
80  void setMetaData(const String& meta_data){}
82  void setWriteFaceInfos(const bool& write_faces_infos){m_write_faces_infos = write_faces_infos;}
86  void write(Arcane::IVariable* var,Arcane::IData* data);
87 
88  void getMeshType(const Arcane::String& mesh_type);
89 
90 
91  protected:
93  const String getGrandParentName(XmlNode currentNode);
94  private:
95 
97  void nodeIdsElement(const String& format, XmlNode current_node, String node_ids="node-ids");
99  void clonedNodeIdsElement(const String& format, XmlNode current_node, String node_ids="cloned_node-ids");
101  void nodeCoordsElement(const String format, XmlNode currentNode);
103  void nodeElement(const String& format, XmlNode currentNode);
105  void updateCoordElement(const String& format, XmlNode currentNode);
107  void cloneNodesElement(const String& format, XmlNode currentNode);
109  void cloneNodeElement(const String& format, XmlNode currentNode);
111  void cellElement(const String format, XmlNode currentNode);
113  void deleteCellElement(const String format, XmlNode currentNode);
115  void faceElement(const String format, XmlNode currentNode);
117  void particleCoordsElement(const String format, XmlNode currentNode);
119  void particleElement(const String format, XmlNode currentNode);
121  void connectionElement(const String format, XmlNode currentNode);
123  void writeGroups(XmlNode current_node , const String format);
125  void groupElement(const ItemGroup& group, const String group_name, const String format, XmlNode currentNode); // group_name necessary to handle .own() operation
127  void createIxmFile(const String& file_name, const String& format);
129  void createIxmDoc();
131  void loadIxmDoc();
132 
133 
135  void updateIxmDoc(const Real& begin_time, const Real& end_time, const Integer& event_number);
136 
137 
139  const String baseFileName() const;
140  const String ixmFileName() const;
141  String ixmFileName(const Integer& event_number);
142  const String hdfFileName() const;
143 
144  ArcGeoSim::IXMDataExchanger* ixmDataExchanger() { return ArcGeoSim::IXMDataExchanger::instance();}
145  private:
146  IMesh* m_mesh;
147 #if (ARCANE_VERSION >= 30003)
148  IGraph2* const m_graph = nullptr ;
149 #endif
150  String m_directory_name;
151  eIXMMeshWriteInfo m_write_mesh;
152  Arcane::ITraceMng* m_trace_mng;
153  IRessourceMng* m_ressource_mng;
154  Arcane::IIOMng* m_io_mng;
155 
156  XmlNode* m_ixm_mesh;
157  XmlNode* m_ixm_event;
158  String m_file_name;
159  String m_hdf_path; // relative to ixm file path
160  String m_format;
161 
162  IXmlDocumentHolder* m_ixm_doc;
163  XmlNode m_grid_node;
164  XmlNode m_event_node;
165  XmlNode m_mesh_node;
166  XmlNode m_event_properties_node;
167  XmlNode m_mesh_properties_node;
168 
169  ItemGroupCollection m_groups;
170 
171  const Integer m_event_number; // Given by Post processor. Cannot be modified in writer
172  const bool m_events_initialized; // Given by Post processor. Cannot be modified in writer
173  bool m_write_only_active_cells;
174  bool m_static_mesh;
175  String m_default_event_filename;
176  String m_supported_version;
177  bool m_write_mesh_properties;
178 
179  Real m_begin_time;
180 
181  bool m_write_faces_infos;
182 
183  IXM4FileInfo fileinfo;
184 
185  ArcGeoSim::ItemConnectionMng m_connection_mng;
186 
187  Arcane::String m_mesh_type;
188 };
189 
190 #endif /* ARCGEOSIM_MESH_EXPORTERS_IXMMESHWRITER_H_ */
